title: Section 8B
content: 1[8B. Advances for purchase of conveyance.--There may be paid to a member by way of repayable advance such sum of money not exceeding 2[four lakh rupees] as may be determined by rules made in this behalf under section 9 for the purchase of a conveyance.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 74 of 1985, s. 7 (w.e.f. 26-12-1985). 2. Subs. by Act 37 of 2010, s. 6, for "one lakh rupees" (w.e.f. 1-10-2010).
